div.p: KV Cache Optimization: By caching Key/Value pairs from previous steps, we avoid $O(L^2)$ redundant dot products in the Self-Attention layers.
Mask: Triu(Ones(L, L), 1) Prevents model from looking at future tokens during decode.
Call: model.decode(gen, memory, mask) Logits: [B, cur_len, Vocab]
